calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ: Irving Pfieffer, Clerks:P. Dias/M. Vallejo, CSR: Susan Crozier
Appearances:
Nasir Patel, Plaintiff present in pro per
David A. Rieker, Defendant present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a (future) judgment against the defendant for restitution and (immediate) possession of the premises of the property located at:
554 Broadway St. #29, San Francisco, CA.
Defendant to pay back rent in installments of $200.00 starting on 7/4/03 until 09/23/03 and weekly rent in the amount of $366.00 due on fridays by 10:00 P.M.
If the defendant complies with the terms of the stipulation case will be dismissed without prejudice.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
